question: Provide the names of all companies operating in the ice cream manufacturing industry, along with the number of companies that are their subsidiaries.
gold: MATCH (n:Company)-[r1:operatesIn]->(m1:Industry {name: 'ice cream manufacturer'}) OPTIONAL MATCH (n:Company)<-[r0:subsidiaryOf]-(m0:Company) WITH n, count(DISTINCT m0) AS num RETURN n.name, num
pred:
MATCH (c:Company)-[:operatesIn]->(i:Industry {name: 'Ice cream manufacturing'}), (c)-[:subsidiaryOf*]->(s:Company)
